meta.title: (Previously) Live Hosting SpaceX Intelsat 35e launch
meta.description:
Ask questions you have about this particular launch or about SpaceX or rockets in general! Chat will be moderated, so please keep it family friendly!

SpaceX is targeting launch of Intelsat 35e from Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The 58-minute launch window opens on Monday, July 5, at 7:37 p.m. EDT, or 23:37 UTC. The satellite will be deployed approximately 32 minutes after launch.

Get your own Everyday Astronaut merch at http://everydayastronaut.com/shop

Show your support by contributing via patreon - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut
